warrior.name: Combat Stance
warrior.description: +2 to MIG skill checks in combat. Passive combat training.

warrior.name: Power Strike
warrior.description: Spend 1 AP to add your MIG modifier as bonus damage to a melee attack.

warrior.name: Second Wind
warrior.description: Once per rest, regain 1d10 + level HP as a bonus action.

warrior.name: Armor Mastery
warrior.description: Reduce armor check penalties by 1. Heavy armor no longer slows you.

warrior.name: Extra Attack
warrior.description: Make one additional attack per turn for 1 AP (instead of 2).

warrior.name: Rallying Cry
warrior.description: Shout to grant all allies within 30 feet +1 to attack rolls for 2 rounds.

warrior.name: Battle Hardened
warrior.description: Years of combat have toughened your hide. Gain +2 AC permanently.

warrior.name: Weapon Specialization
warrior.description: +2 damage with your equipped weapon type permanently.

warrior.name: Mighty Blow
warrior.description: Once per turn, make a strike that deals double damage on hit.

warrior.name: Enduring Stamina
warrior.description: Gain +5 max HP. Your Second Wind now heals an additional 1d6.

warrior.name: Indomitable
warrior.description: Once per rest, reroll a failed saving throw and use the new result.

warrior.name: Improved Critical
warrior.description: Your weapon attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20.

warrior.name: Tactical Advance
warrior.description: Move up to 10 feet without provoking opportunity attacks after hitting an enemy.

warrior.name: Sweeping Strike
warrior.description: Attack all adjacent enemies with a single swing for normal weapon damage.

warrior.name: Iron Will
warrior.description: +2 to saving throws against charm, fear, and psychic effects.

warrior.name: Shield Bash
warrior.description: If wielding a shield, make a bonus attack that deals 1d6+MIG and staggers the target for 1 round.

warrior.name: Relentless Endurance
warrior.description: When reduced to 0 HP, drop to 1 HP instead. Once per long rest.

warrior.name: Whirlwind Attack
warrior.description: Make a melee attack against every enemy within 5 feet for full weapon damage.

warrior.name: Battle Master
warrior.description: Gain a superiority die (d8). Add it to attack rolls, damage, or saving throws 3 times per rest.

warrior.name: Fortified Body
warrior.description: Gain resistance to non-magical bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage.

warrior.name: Extra Attack II
warrior.description: You can now make two additional attacks per turn instead of one.

warrior.name: Intimidating Presence
warrior.description: Spend 1 AP to frighten one creature within 30 feet for 1 round on a failed PRE save.

warrior.name: Superior Critical
warrior.description: Your critical hits now deal triple damage instead of double.

warrior.name: Indomitable II
warrior.description: You can now use Indomitable twice per rest.

warrior.name: Devastating Critical
warrior.description: When you score a critical hit, the target must make an END save or be stunned for 1 round.

warrior.name: Unyielding
warrior.description: +3 to all saving throws. Your resolve is nearly unbreakable.

warrior.name: Commanding Shout
warrior.description: Shout a command that forces all enemies within 20 feet to make a PRE save or lose their reaction until your next turn.

warrior.name: War Leader
warrior.description: Allies within 30 feet gain +2 to attack rolls and saving throws while you are conscious.

warrior.name: Crushing Blow
warrior.description: Make a single devastating attack dealing 3x weapon damage that ignores armor.

warrior.name: Survivor
warrior.description: At the start of each turn, if below half HP, regain HP equal to 5 + END modifier.

warrior.name: Extra Attack III
warrior.description: You can now make three additional attacks per turn.

warrior.name: Legendary Resistance
warrior.description: Automatically succeed on a failed saving throw. Usable 3 times per long rest.

warrior.name: Unstoppable Force
warrior.description: Your attacks cannot be reduced by resistance. You ignore all damage reduction.

warrior.name: Avatar of War
warrior.description: For 1 minute, gain +4 to MIG, double movement speed, and advantage on all attacks. Once per long rest.

warrior.name: Indomitable III
warrior.description: You can now use Indomitable three times per rest. Your will is absolute.

warrior.name: Paragon of Battle
warrior.description: Gain +4 to MIG and END permanently. Your max for these stats is now 24.

warrior.name: Warlord's Decree
warrior.description: Once per long rest, command all allies within 60 feet to immediately make one free attack or move.

rogue.name: Sneak Attack
rogue.description: Deal +1d6 bonus damage when attacking with advantage.

rogue.name: Thieves' Cant
rogue.description: You know a secret criminal language. Gain +2 to deception checks with underworld contacts.

rogue.name: Nimble Escape
rogue.description: Disengage or hide as a free action once per turn.

rogue.name: Expertise
rogue.description: Double your proficiency bonus for two skills you are proficient in.

rogue.name: Cunning Action
rogue.description: Dash, Disengage, or Hide costs only 1 AP instead of 2.

rogue.name: Dirty Trick
rogue.description: Throw sand or a concealed blade to blind or disarm a target for 1 round.

rogue.name: Uncanny Dodge
rogue.description: When an attacker you can see hits you, halve the damage once per round.

rogue.name: Shadow Step
rogue.description: Teleport up to 30 feet to a space in dim light or darkness as a bonus action.

rogue.name: Evasion
rogue.description: When you succeed on a DEX saving throw, you take 0 damage.

rogue.name: Sneak Attack II
rogue.description: Sneak Attack damage increases to +2d6.

rogue.name: Reliable Talent
rogue.description: Treat any roll of 9 or lower on a skill check as a 10.

rogue.name: Ambush
rogue.description: If you act in the first round of combat, deal an extra 2d6 damage on your first attack.

rogue.name: Elusive
rogue.description: No attack roll can have advantage against you while you are conscious.

rogue.name: Garrote
rogue.description: Grapple an unaware target to deal 3d6 damage per round until they escape.

rogue.name: Slippery Mind
rogue.description: Gain proficiency in MND saving throws.

rogue.name: Poisoner
rogue.description: Apply poison to your weapon as a bonus action. Adds 1d8 poison damage for 3 attacks.

rogue.name: Sneak Attack III
rogue.description: Sneak Attack damage increases to +3d6.

rogue.name: Assassinate
rogue.description: Attacks against surprised targets are automatic critical hits.

rogue.name: Expertise II
rogue.description: Double your proficiency bonus for two additional skills.

rogue.name: Vanishing Act
rogue.description: Become invisible for 1 round after killing an enemy or reducing them to 0 HP.

rogue.name: Blindsense
rogue.description: Detect invisible or hidden creatures within 10 feet.

rogue.name: Sneak Attack IV
rogue.description: Sneak Attack damage increases to +4d6.

rogue.name: Thief's Reflexes
rogue.description: Take two turns during the first round of combat instead of one.

rogue.name: Sneak Attack V
rogue.description: Sneak Attack damage increases to +5d6.

rogue.name: Death Strike
rogue.description: When you hit a surprised creature, it must make an END save or take double damage.

rogue.name: Shadow Dance
rogue.description: In dim light, gain +3 AC and advantage on all AGI saves.

rogue.name: Sneak Attack VI
rogue.description: Sneak Attack damage increases to +6d6.

rogue.name: Master Infiltrator
rogue.description: You can perfectly mimic voices and disguise yourself. +5 to deception checks.

rogue.name: Sneak Attack VII
rogue.description: Sneak Attack damage increases to +7d6.

rogue.name: Crippling Strike
rogue.description: Your attacks against surprised or flanked targets reduce their movement speed by half for 2 rounds.

rogue.name: Stroke of Luck
rogue.description: Once per rest, turn a missed attack into a hit or treat a failed skill check as a 20.

rogue.name: Sneak Attack VIII
rogue.description: Sneak Attack damage increases to +8d6.

rogue.name: Ghost Walk
rogue.description: Become ethereal for 1 round, passing through walls and ignoring all damage. Once per rest.

rogue.name: Sneak Attack IX
rogue.description: Sneak Attack damage increases to +9d6.

rogue.name: Perfect Evasion
rogue.description: When you fail a DEX saving throw, you take half damage. When you succeed, you take none.

rogue.name: Shadow Master
rogue.description: Gain permanent invisibility in dim light. Sneak Attack damage increases to +10d6.

rogue.name: Coup de Grace
rogue.description: Once per long rest, make an attack that automatically crits and applies max Sneak Attack damage.

mage.name: Arcane Recovery
mage.description: Once per rest, recover level/2 spell points.

mage.name: Mage Armor
mage.description: When not wearing armor, your AC equals 10 + AGI modifier + MND modifier.

mage.name: Spellcraft
mage.description: Your mastery of spell theory increases your spell save DC by 1.

mage.name: Arcane Ward
mage.description: Create a magical shield with HP equal to twice your mage level. Absorbs damage before your HP.

mage.name: Expanded Spells
mage.description: You learn 2 additional spells of your choice.

mage.name: Counterspell
mage.description: As a reaction, attempt to negate an enemy spell. Automatic if their spell costs fewer SP.

mage.name: Metamagic: Quicken
mage.description: Spend 2 spell points to cast a spell as a bonus action (1 AP instead of 2).

mage.name: Spell Sculpting
mage.description: When casting area spells, choose a number of creatures equal to your MND modifier to automatically succeed on their save.

mage.name: Potent Cantrip
mage.description: Your cantrips deal bonus damage equal to your MND modifier.

mage.name: Empowered Evocation
mage.description: Add your MND modifier to the damage of any evocation spell you cast.

mage.name: Spell Mastery
mage.description: Choose one 1st-level and one 2nd-level spell. You can cast them without spending spell points.

mage.name: Arcane Blast
mage.description: Channel raw arcane energy to deal 4d8 force damage in a 15-foot cone.

mage.name: Spell Penetration
mage.description: Your spells ignore resistance to their damage type. +2 to overcome spell immunity.

mage.name: Teleport
mage.description: Instantly teleport to any location you can see within 60 feet.

mage.name: Arcane Ward II
mage.description: Your Arcane Ward now has HP equal to three times your mage level and regenerates 1d6 per turn.

mage.name: Chain Spell
mage.description: When you cast a single-target spell, spend 3 extra SP to have it jump to a second target.

mage.name: Signature Spell
mage.description: Choose one 3rd-level spell. You can cast it once per rest without spending spell points.

mage.name: Time Stop
mage.description: Freeze time for 1 round, gaining 2 extra turns. Cannot attack frozen creatures directly.

mage.name: Metamagic: Twin
mage.description: When casting a single-target spell, spend SP equal to its cost to target a second creature.

mage.name: Spell Resistance
mage.description: Gain advantage on saving throws against spells and magical effects.

mage.name: Overchannel
mage.description: Maximize the damage of a spell of 5th level or lower. Take 2d12 necrotic damage per spell level above 1st.

mage.name: Greater Spell Focus
mage.description: Your spell save DC increases by an additional +2.

mage.name: Arcane Recovery II
mage.description: Arcane Recovery now restores spell points equal to your full level.

mage.name: Spell Absorption
mage.description: When you succeed on a save against a spell, regain SP equal to half the spell's cost.

mage.name: Meteor Swarm
mage.description: Call down 4 meteors in a 40-foot area dealing 6d6 fire and 6d6 bludgeoning damage each.

mage.name: Arcane Mastery
mage.description: You can concentrate on two spells simultaneously instead of one.

mage.name: Elemental Mastery
mage.description: Choose one element. Spells of that element deal +3 damage and cost 1 less SP.

mage.name: Greater Signature Spell
mage.description: Choose one 5th-level spell. You can cast it once per rest without spending spell points.

mage.name: Prismatic Wall
mage.description: Create a shimmering wall of 7 layers, each with a different damaging effect. Lasts 10 minutes.

mage.name: Eldritch Immunity
mage.description: Gain immunity to one damage type of your choice. Choose a new type after each long rest.

mage.name: Power Word Kill
mage.description: Speak a word of power that instantly kills a creature with fewer than 50 HP.

mage.name: Infinite Arcana
mage.description: All 1st and 2nd level spells cost 0 SP to cast.

mage.name: Reality Warp
mage.description: Alter reality in a 30-foot area: reverse gravity, transmute elements, or reshape terrain. Once per rest.

mage.name: Spell Perfection
mage.description: Choose one spell you know. It costs half SP, has +4 to hit, and its save DC increases by 3.

mage.name: Metamagic: Maximize
mage.description: Spend 4 extra SP to maximize all damage dice of a spell automatically.

mage.name: Arcane Supremacy
mage.description: Gain +4 to MND permanently. Your spell save DC and spell attacks gain +3. Max MND is now 24.

mage.name: Wish
mage.description: Once per long rest, duplicate any spell effect or create a unique magical outcome as determined by the GM.

priest.name: Divine Favor
priest.description: Once per rest, add +1d4 to all rolls for 1 minute.

priest.name: Sacred Focus
priest.description: Your healing spells always heal at least their minimum value + your INS modifier.

priest.name: Healing Touch
priest.description: Cure Wounds and similar spells heal additional HP equal to your level.

priest.name: Spiritual Weapon
priest.description: Summon a floating spectral weapon that attacks for 1d8+INS damage each turn for 3 rounds.

priest.name: Channel Divinity
priest.description: Once per rest, turn undead or restore 2d6 HP to allies in 30ft.

priest.name: Blessed Healer
priest.description: When you cast a healing spell on another, regain HP equal to the spell's level + 2.

priest.name: Sacred Flame
priest.description: Your fire damage ignores resistance. Sacred attacks bypass normal defenses.

priest.name: Guardian Spirit
priest.description: Summon a guardian spirit that grants +2 AC to an ally for 3 rounds.

priest.name: Greater Heal
priest.description: Channel 4 spell points to restore 4d8+5 HP to one target.

priest.name: Divine Shield
priest.description: Grant an ally a divine shield absorbing up to 15 damage. Lasts until depleted or 1 minute.

priest.name: Channel Divinity II
priest.description: You can now use Channel Divinity twice per rest.

priest.name: Banish Undead
priest.description: Undead within 30 feet must make an INS save or be destroyed if CR 1/2 or lower, or flee for 1 minute.

priest.name: Divine Strike
priest.description: Once per turn, add 1d8 radiant damage to a weapon attack.

priest.name: Mass Healing Word
priest.description: Heal up to 6 allies within 60 feet for 1d4 + INS modifier HP each.

priest.name: Potent Spellcasting
priest.description: Add your INS modifier to the damage of any cleric cantrip.

priest.name: Resurrection
priest.description: Restore a dead ally to life with 1 HP if they died within the last hour. Requires a diamond worth 300 gold.

priest.name: Supreme Healing
priest.description: When you roll to restore HP, treat any dice result of 1-3 as a 4.

priest.name: Holy Fire
priest.description: Call down a pillar of holy fire dealing 6d8 radiant damage in a 15-foot radius.

priest.name: Aura of Sanctity
priest.description: You and allies within 15 feet gain +2 to all saving throws against spells.

priest.name: Greater Restoration
priest.description: Remove one curse, disease, poison, or ability drain from a target.

priest.name: Divine Strike II
priest.description: Divine Strike damage increases to 2d8 radiant.

priest.name: Mass Cure Wounds
priest.description: Heal up to 6 allies within 60 feet for 3d8 + INS modifier HP each.

priest.name: Channel Divinity III
priest.description: You can now use Channel Divinity three times per rest.

priest.name: Celestial Radiance
priest.description: Emit holy light in 30 feet. Undead take 2d6 radiant damage per round. Allies heal 1d6 per round.

priest.name: Miracle Worker
priest.description: Your healing spells restore an additional 50% HP (round up).

priest.name: Divine Intervention
priest.description: Once per long rest, call upon your deity. Roll percentile; if under your level, the deity intervenes directly.

priest.name: Empowered Healing
priest.description: All healing spells you cast gain +5 flat bonus HP healed.

priest.name: Regeneration
priest.description: Touch an ally to grant them regeneration of 4d8+15 HP over 1 minute.

priest.name: Holy Aura
priest.description: All allies within 30 feet gain advantage on saving throws and emit dim light for 1 minute.

priest.name: Beacon of Hope
priest.description: For 1 minute, allies within 30 feet gain advantage on INS saves and healing spells restore maximum HP.

priest.name: True Resurrection
priest.description: Restore a creature dead for up to 200 years to full life, even without a body.

priest.name: Avatar of the Divine
priest.description: Once per rest, assume a divine form gaining +4 INS, wings (fly speed 60), and radiant aura for 1 minute.

priest.name: Blessed Body
priest.description: You are immune to disease and poison. You do not age and cannot be aged magically.

priest.name: Mass Heal
priest.description: Restore up to 700 HP total, distributed among any creatures within 60 feet as you choose.

priest.name: Undying Faith
priest.description: When reduced to 0 HP, automatically stabilize and regain 1 HP at the start of your next turn.

priest.name: Divine Intervention II
priest.description: Divine Intervention now succeeds automatically once per long rest.

priest.name: Hand of God
priest.description: Once per long rest, call down divine wrath dealing 10d10 radiant damage in a 60-foot radius, healing allies for the same amount.

ranger.name: Keen Eye
ranger.description: +2 to INS skill checks for tracking, spotting traps, and detecting hidden creatures.

ranger.name: Favored Enemy
ranger.description: Choose a creature type. Gain +2 damage and advantage on tracking checks against that type.

ranger.name: Marked Shot
ranger.description: Once per turn, mark a target. Your next ranged attack against it deals +1d6 damage.

ranger.name: Natural Explorer
ranger.description: Difficult terrain does not slow your group. You cannot become lost except by magical means.

ranger.name: Fieldcraft
ranger.description: Natural terrain no longer costs extra AP to traverse. Ignore movement penalties from undergrowth, mud, and shallow water.

ranger.name: Hail of Thorns
ranger.description: Your ranged attack explodes on impact dealing 1d10 piercing damage to all within 5 feet of the target.

ranger.name: Volley
ranger.description: Fire a spread of arrows hitting up to 3 enemies in a cone. Each target takes normal weapon damage.

ranger.name: Hunter's Instinct
ranger.description: Gain advantage on initiative rolls and +2 to perception checks.

ranger.name: Vanish
ranger.description: Once per rest, become hidden as a free action even while observed. Lasts until you attack or end of your next turn.

ranger.name: Extra Attack
ranger.description: Make one additional attack per turn for 1 AP.

ranger.name: Favored Enemy II
ranger.description: Choose an additional favored enemy type. Bonus damage increases to +4 against all favored enemies.

ranger.name: Conjure Barrage
ranger.description: Throw a weapon or fire ammunition in a 60-foot cone dealing 3d8 damage to all targets.

ranger.name: Evasion
ranger.description: When you succeed on an AGI save against an area effect, you take no damage instead of half.

ranger.name: Steel Wind Strike
ranger.description: Vanish and make a melee attack against up to 5 creatures within 30 feet, teleporting between them.

ranger.name: Land's Stride
ranger.description: Moving through nonmagical difficult terrain costs no extra movement. +2 to saves against plants that impede movement.

ranger.name: Guardian of Nature
ranger.description: Transform into a nature guardian gaining +2 AC, 10 temp HP, and advantage on AGI-based attacks for 1 minute.

ranger.name: Hide in Plain Sight
ranger.description: Spend 1 minute camouflaging yourself. Gain +10 to stealth checks while remaining still.

ranger.name: Marked Shot II
ranger.description: Marked Shot damage increases to +2d6 and the mark lasts for 2 attacks.

ranger.name: Nature's Veil
ranger.description: Become invisible until the start of your next turn. Usable a number of times equal to your INS modifier per rest.

ranger.name: Tireless
ranger.description: Gain temp HP equal to 1d8 + INS modifier when finishing a short rest. Reduce exhaustion by 1 on short rest.

ranger.name: Volley II
ranger.description: Volley now hits up to 6 enemies and deals +1d6 bonus damage.

ranger.name: Swift Quiver
ranger.description: For 1 minute, make two additional ranged attacks each turn as bonus actions.

ranger.name: Camouflage Expert
ranger.description: You can attempt to hide even when only lightly obscured. +5 to stealth in natural terrain.

ranger.name: Favored Enemy III
ranger.description: Add a third favored enemy. Bonus damage increases to +6 against all favored enemies.

ranger.name: Wounding Strike
ranger.description: Your attacks cause bleeding: target takes 1d6 damage at the start of each turn for 3 rounds.

ranger.name: Stalker's Flurry
ranger.description: Once per turn, when you miss with an attack, make another attack against the same or different target.

ranger.name: Primal Awareness
ranger.description: You can sense the presence of aberrations, celestials, fiends, and undead within 1 mile.

ranger.name: Feral Senses
ranger.description: You can sense invisible creatures within 30 feet and attack them without disadvantage.

ranger.name: Killing Shot
ranger.description: Make a single devastating ranged attack dealing 4x weapon damage. Must spend a full turn aiming.

ranger.name: Vanish II
ranger.description: Vanish is now usable 3 times per rest and lasts for 2 rounds.

ranger.name: Multiattack Defense
ranger.description: After a creature hits you, gain +4 AC against all subsequent attacks from that creature until your next turn.

ranger.name: Arrow Storm
ranger.description: Fire a barrage of arrows dealing 8d6 piercing damage in a 20-foot radius at a point within 150 feet.

ranger.name: One with Nature
ranger.description: You are immune to poison, disease, and cannot be tracked by nonmagical means.

ranger.name: Foe Slayer
ranger.description: Once per turn, add your INS modifier to the attack roll or damage of an attack against a favored enemy.

ranger.name: Eyes of the Eagle
ranger.description: Your vision extends to 1 mile with perfect clarity. You cannot be surprised.

ranger.name: Apex Predator
ranger.description: Gain +4 to AGI and INS permanently. Your max for these stats is now 24.

ranger.name: Perfect Shot
ranger.description: Once per long rest, make a ranged attack that automatically hits and deals maximum damage plus 10d6 bonus damage.

paladin.name: Lay on Hands
paladin.description: Once per rest, restore HP equal to paladin level x 3 to one ally by touch.

paladin.name: Divine Sense
paladin.description: Detect the presence of undead, fiends, or celestials within 60 feet. Usable 1+PRE modifier times per rest.

paladin.name: Divine Smite
paladin.description: On a melee hit, spend 2 spell points to deal +2d8 radiant damage. Extra 1d8 against undead or fiends.

paladin.name: Fighting Style
paladin.description: +2 damage with melee weapons when wielding a weapon in one hand and a shield in the other.

paladin.name: Aura of Courage
paladin.description: You and allies within 10 feet are immune to fear effects.

paladin.name: Sacred Weapon
paladin.description: Bless your weapon to gain +PRE modifier to attack rolls and emit bright light for 1 minute.

paladin.name: Sacred Oath
paladin.description: +1 to all saving throws for you and allies within 10 feet permanently.

paladin.name: Compelled Duel
paladin.description: Force a creature to focus on you. It has disadvantage on attacks against others for 1 minute.

paladin.name: Cleansing Strike
paladin.description: Once per rest, make a melee attack that deals normal damage and removes one disease, poison, or curse from the target.

paladin.name: Extra Attack
paladin.description: Make one additional attack per turn for 1 AP.

paladin.name: Aura of Protection
paladin.description: You and allies within 10 feet add your PRE modifier to all saving throws.

paladin.name: Divine Smite II
paladin.description: Divine Smite now deals +3d8 radiant damage and +2d8 against undead or fiends.

paladin.name: Relentless Avenger
paladin.description: When you hit a creature with an opportunity attack, move up to half your speed toward it.

paladin.name: Shield of Faith
paladin.description: Grant an ally +2 AC for 10 minutes as a bonus action.

paladin.name: Aura of Courage II
paladin.description: Your Aura of Courage extends to 30 feet and also grants immunity to charm.

paladin.name: Blinding Smite
paladin.description: On a melee hit, deal +3d8 radiant and the target must save or be blinded for 1 round.

paladin.name: Cleansing Touch
paladin.description: End one spell on yourself or a willing creature you touch. Usable PRE modifier times per rest.

paladin.name: Radiant Defense
paladin.description: When hit by a melee attack, the attacker takes 1d8 radiant damage.

paladin.name: Aura of Protection II
paladin.description: Aura of Protection extends to 30 feet.

paladin.name: Banishing Smite
paladin.description: On a melee hit, deal +5d10 radiant damage. If target drops below 50 HP, banish it to a demiplane.

paladin.name: Improved Divine Smite
paladin.description: All your melee attacks deal an additional 1d8 radiant damage automatically.

paladin.name: Circle of Power
paladin.description: Allies within 30 feet gain advantage on saves against spells and magical effects for 1 minute.

paladin.name: Radiant Defense II
paladin.description: Radiant Defense damage increases to 2d8 and affects ranged attacks within 5 feet.

paladin.name: Crusader's Mantle
paladin.description: Allies within 30 feet deal an extra 1d4 radiant damage on all weapon attacks for 1 minute.

paladin.name: Undying Sentinel
paladin.description: When reduced to 0 HP, drop to 1 HP instead. Once per long rest. You also do not suffer disadvantages of old age.

paladin.name: Elder Champion
paladin.description: For 1 minute, regenerate 10 HP per round, cast spells as bonus actions, and enemies within 10 feet have disadvantage on saves.

paladin.name: Aura of the Sentinel
paladin.description: You and allies within 30 feet gain +5 to initiative rolls.

paladin.name: Holy Weapon
paladin.description: Imbue your weapon with divine power: +2d8 radiant damage on every hit for 1 hour.

paladin.name: Bulwark of Faith
paladin.description: Gain +3 AC permanently. Your armor seems to glow with divine protection.

paladin.name: Inspiring Smite
paladin.description: After using Divine Smite, distribute temp HP equal to 2d8 + PRE modifier among allies within 30 feet.

paladin.name: Holy Nimbus
paladin.description: Emit an aura of sunlight in 30 feet. Enemies starting their turn in it take 10 radiant damage. Lasts 1 minute.

paladin.name: Champion's Grace
paladin.description: You are immune to disease, poison, and the frightened condition permanently.

paladin.name: Celestial Form
paladin.description: Once per rest, grow angelic wings (fly speed 60) and gain resistance to all damage for 1 minute.

paladin.name: Lay on Hands II
paladin.description: Lay on Hands pool doubles and can now resurrect a creature dead for less than 1 minute.

paladin.name: Oath Fulfilled
paladin.description: Your auras extend to 60 feet. PRE modifier is added twice to saving throws for allies.

paladin.name: Divine Champion
paladin.description: Gain +4 to MIG and PRE permanently. Your max for these stats is now 24.

paladin.name: Judgment of the Righteous
paladin.description: Once per long rest, judge all enemies within 60 feet. They take 8d10 radiant damage and are stunned for 1 round.

bard.name: Bardic Inspiration
bard.description: Once per rest, grant one ally a +1d6 bonus to their next ability check, attack roll, or saving throw.

bard.name: Cantrip Versatility
bard.description: You know 2 cantrips from any class spell list. Your performance is your spellcasting focus.

bard.name: Jack of All Trades
bard.description: +1 to all skill checks you are not proficient in.

bard.name: Song of Courage
bard.description: Play a rallying song granting all allies within 30 feet +1 to attack rolls for 3 rounds.

bard.name: Cutting Words
bard.description: As a reaction, spend 1 spell point to reduce an enemy's attack roll by 1d6.

bard.name: Expertise
bard.description: Double proficiency bonus for two skills you are proficient in.

bard.name: Song of Rest
bard.description: During a rest, allies regain additional 1d6 HP. Stacks with normal rest recovery.

bard.name: Dissonant Whispers
bard.description: Whisper a discordant melody dealing 3d6 psychic damage and forcing the target to flee on a failed INS save.

bard.name: Countercharm
bard.description: Once per rest, all allies within 30 feet gain advantage on saving throws against charm and fear for 1 minute.

bard.name: Font of Inspiration
bard.description: Bardic Inspiration now recharges on a short rest instead of a long rest.

bard.name: Bardic Inspiration II
bard.description: Bardic Inspiration die increases to 1d8. Usable PRE modifier times per rest.

bard.name: Magical Secrets
bard.description: Learn 2 spells from any class spell list. They count as bard spells for you.

bard.name: Hypnotic Pattern
bard.description: Create a mesmerizing pattern that charms all creatures in a 30-foot cube on a failed INS save.

bard.name: War Drummer
bard.description: While you perform, allies within 30 feet gain +10 movement speed.

bard.name: Song of Rest II
bard.description: Song of Rest die increases to 1d8.

bard.name: Mantle of Inspiration
bard.description: Grant up to 5 allies 8 temp HP each and they can immediately move half their speed without opportunity attacks.

bard.name: Bardic Inspiration III
bard.description: Bardic Inspiration die increases to 1d10.

bard.name: Irresistible Dance
bard.description: Force a creature to dance, wasting its movement and granting attacks against it advantage. INS save each turn to end.

bard.name: Magical Secrets II
bard.description: Learn 2 additional spells from any class spell list.

bard.name: Enthralling Performance
bard.description: After performing for 1 minute, charm up to 5 humanoids who watched for 1 hour.

bard.name: Cutting Words II
bard.description: Cutting Words now reduces attack, damage, or ability check rolls by 1d8.

bard.name: Power Word Stun
bard.description: Speak a word of power that stuns a creature with 150 HP or fewer until it saves at end of each turn.

bard.name: Song of Rest III
bard.description: Song of Rest die increases to 1d10.

bard.name: Bardic Inspiration IV
bard.description: Bardic Inspiration die increases to 1d12.

bard.name: Mass Suggestion
bard.description: Suggest a course of activity to up to 12 creatures. Those that fail an INS save follow it for 24 hours.

bard.name: Magical Secrets III
bard.description: Learn 2 additional spells from any class spell list.

bard.name: Panache
bard.description: Your charm is irresistible. Hostile creatures within 30 feet must save or be unable to target anyone but you.

bard.name: Mantle of Majesty
bard.description: For 1 minute, cast Command as a bonus action each turn without spending SP. Targets have disadvantage on the save.

bard.name: Song of Rest IV
bard.description: Song of Rest die increases to 1d12.

bard.name: Master Performer
bard.description: Your performance-based abilities have their DCs increased by 3 and their effects last twice as long.

bard.name: Power Word Heal
bard.description: Speak a word of power to restore a creature to full HP and end all conditions on it.

bard.name: Superior Inspiration
bard.description: If you have no Bardic Inspiration uses when you roll initiative, regain one use.

bard.name: Glibness
bard.description: For 1 hour, treat any PRE check roll below 15 as a 15. You cannot be detected as lying by magic.

bard.name: Magical Secrets IV
bard.description: Learn 2 additional spells from any class spell list. You now know spells from every tradition.

bard.name: Cutting Words III
bard.description: Cutting Words now reduces by 1d12 and can affect saving throws as well.

bard.name: Virtuoso
bard.description: Gain +4 to PRE permanently. Your max PRE is now 24. Bardic Inspiration uses are unlimited.

bard.name: Magnum Opus
bard.description: Once per long rest, perform a masterwork that duplicates any spell of 7th level or lower from any class list.

druid.name: Druidic
druid.description: You know the secret language of druids. Gain +2 to nature and survival checks.

druid.name: Entangle
druid.description: Grasping vines erupt in a 20-foot area. Creatures must make an AGI save or be restrained for 1 minute.

druid.name: Wild Shape
druid.description: Transform into a beast you have seen with CR 1/4 or lower. Lasts 1 hour. Usable twice per rest.

druid.name: Natural Recovery
druid.description: Once per rest, recover spell points equal to half your druid level during a short rest.

druid.name: Wild Shape II
druid.description: You can now transform into beasts with CR 1/2. Your beast forms gain +2 AC.

druid.name: Moonbeam
druid.description: Call down a beam of moonlight in a 5-foot cylinder dealing 2d10 radiant damage per round.

druid.name: Wild Shape III
druid.description: Transform into beasts with CR 1. You can now assume forms with a swim speed.

druid.name: Call Lightning
druid.description: Summon a storm cloud. Each turn, call a lightning bolt dealing 3d10 damage in a 5-foot radius.

druid.name: Primal Strike
druid.description: Your attacks in beast form count as magical for the purpose of overcoming resistance.

druid.name: Conjure Animals
druid.description: Summon 2 beasts of CR 1 or lower that obey your commands for 1 hour.

druid.name: Wild Shape IV
druid.description: Transform into beasts with CR 2. Your beast forms gain +10 temp HP.

druid.name: Wall of Thorns
druid.description: Create a wall of thorns up to 60 feet long. Creatures passing through take 7d8 piercing damage.

druid.name: Elemental Wild Shape
druid.description: Spend two Wild Shape uses to transform into an earth, water, fire, or air elemental.

druid.name: Nature's Ward
druid.description: You are immune to poison and disease. You cannot be charmed or frightened by fey or elementals.

druid.name: Land's Blessing
druid.description: Choose a terrain type. While in that terrain, regain 1d6 SP at the start of each combat round.

druid.name: Ice Storm
druid.description: Hail and sleet pound a 20-foot radius dealing 2d8 bludgeoning and 4d6 cold damage.

druid.name: Beast Spells
druid.description: You can cast spells while in Wild Shape form, using natural movements as somatic components.

druid.name: Sunbeam
druid.description: Fire a beam of brilliant light dealing 6d8 radiant damage in a 60-foot line. Blinds on failed END save.

druid.name: Wild Shape V
druid.description: Transform into beasts with CR 3. You retain your mental stats in beast form.

druid.name: Commune with Nature
druid.description: Become one with the land in a 3-mile radius, learning terrain, water, inhabitants, and buildings.

druid.name: Improved Elemental Form
druid.description: Your elemental Wild Shape gains +20 temp HP and +2 to attack and damage rolls.

druid.name: Tsunami
druid.description: Conjure a massive wave 300 feet long and 50 feet tall dealing 6d10 bludgeoning damage.

druid.name: Timeless Body
druid.description: You age 1 year for every 10 that pass. You no longer need food or water.

druid.name: Regenerate
druid.description: Touch a creature to restore 4d8+15 HP and regrow severed limbs over 2 minutes.

druid.name: Thousand Forms
druid.description: You can cast Alter Self at will without spending SP, changing your appearance freely.

druid.name: Nature's Sanctuary
druid.description: Beasts and plant creatures must make an INS save to attack you. On fail, they must choose a different target.

druid.name: Wild Shape VI
druid.description: Transform into beasts with CR 4 or lower. Beast forms gain resistance to non-magical physical damage.

druid.name: Earthquake
druid.description: Create a seismic disturbance in a 100-foot radius. Structures take 50 damage. Creatures are knocked prone on failed AGI save.

druid.name: Ancient's Resilience
druid.description: Gain resistance to all spell damage. Your Wild Shape forms share this resistance.

druid.name: Elemental Adept
druid.description: Choose one element. Treat any 1 on damage dice as a 2 for spells of that element. Ignore resistance.

druid.name: Foresight
druid.description: For 8 hours, one creature cannot be surprised, has advantage on all rolls, and attackers have disadvantage.

druid.name: Master of Beasts
druid.description: Conjured beasts gain +4 to attack, +10 HP, and their CR limit increases by 1.

druid.name: Storm of Vengeance
druid.description: Create a 360-foot storm dealing acid, lightning, hail, and wind damage over 10 rounds.

druid.name: Archdruid
druid.description: Wild Shape uses are unlimited. You can ignore verbal and somatic components for druid spells.

druid.name: Primal Rejuvenation
druid.description: At the start of each turn, if not at max HP, regain HP equal to your INS modifier.

druid.name: Avatar of Nature
druid.description: Gain +4 to INS and END permanently. Your max for these stats is now 24. All nature spells cost half SP.

druid.name: Wrath of the World
druid.description: Once per long rest, command the land itself to attack. All enemies within 120 feet take 10d10 damage and are restrained.

monk.name: Martial Arts
monk.description: Your unarmed strikes deal 1d4 damage. You can use AGI instead of MIG for attack and damage rolls.

monk.name: Flurry of Blows
monk.description: After taking the Attack action, spend 1 ki to make two unarmed strikes as a bonus action.

monk.name: Unarmored Defense
monk.description: While wearing no armor, your AC equals 10 + AGI modifier + INS modifier.

monk.name: Patient Defense
monk.description: Spend 1 ki to take the Dodge action as a bonus action, imposing disadvantage on attacks against you.

monk.name: Deflect Missiles
monk.description: Use your reaction to reduce ranged weapon damage by 1d10 + AGI modifier + level. If reduced to 0, catch and throw it back.

monk.name: Unarmored Movement
monk.description: Your speed increases by 10 feet while not wearing armor.

monk.name: Slow Fall
monk.description: Use your reaction to reduce falling damage by 5 times your monk level.

monk.name: Martial Arts II
monk.description: Unarmed strike damage increases to 1d6.

monk.name: Stunning Strike
monk.description: When you hit with a melee attack, spend 1 ki to stun the target until the end of your next turn on a failed END save.

monk.name: Extra Attack
monk.description: Make one additional attack per turn for 1 AP.

monk.name: Ki-Empowered Strikes
monk.description: Your unarmed strikes count as magical for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity.

monk.name: Wholeness of Body
monk.description: Once per rest, regain HP equal to 3 times your monk level as an action.

monk.name: Evasion
monk.description: When you succeed on an AGI save, take no damage. On a fail, take half damage.

monk.name: Step of the Wind
monk.description: Spend 1 ki to Dash or Disengage as a bonus action and double your jump distance.

monk.name: Stillness of Mind
monk.description: Use your action to end one charmed or frightened condition on yourself.

monk.name: Unarmored Movement II
monk.description: Your speed bonus increases to +20 feet. You can move along vertical surfaces and across liquids.

monk.name: Martial Arts III
monk.description: Unarmed strike damage increases to 1d8.

monk.name: Focused Aim
monk.description: When you miss an attack, spend 1-3 ki to add +2 per ki spent to the attack roll, potentially turning it into a hit.

monk.name: Purity of Body
monk.description: You are immune to disease and poison.

monk.name: Quivering Palm
monk.description: Strike a creature and set up imperceptible vibrations. Within 14 days, use an action to deal 10d10 necrotic damage or reduce to 0 HP on failed END save.

monk.name: Tongue of Sun and Moon
monk.description: You can understand and speak all languages.

monk.name: Fist of Four Thunders
monk.description: Spend 2 ki to unleash a shockwave in a 15-foot cone dealing 4d8 thunder damage and pushing enemies 10 feet.

monk.name: Diamond Soul
monk.description: Gain proficiency in all saving throws. Spend 1 ki to reroll a failed save.

monk.name: Martial Arts IV
monk.description: Unarmed strike damage increases to 1d10.

monk.name: Shadow Arts
monk.description: Spend 2 ki to cast Darkness, Darkvision, Pass without Trace, or Silence without material components.

monk.name: Timeless Body
monk.description: You no longer suffer the frailty of old age. You cannot be aged magically. You need no food or water.

monk.name: Ki Surge
monk.description: Once per rest, regain all expended ki points as a bonus action.

monk.name: Unarmored Movement III
monk.description: Your speed bonus increases to +30 feet. You are immune to the slowed condition.

monk.name: Open Hand Technique
monk.description: When you hit with Flurry of Blows, impose one: knocked prone, pushed 15 feet, or cannot take reactions.

monk.name: Empty Body
monk.description: Spend 4 ki to become invisible for 1 minute and gain resistance to all damage except force.

monk.name: Martial Arts V
monk.description: Unarmed strike damage increases to 1d12.

monk.name: Touch of Death
monk.description: Spend 3 ki when you hit. Target must make an END save or be reduced to 0 HP. On success, take 10d10 necrotic.

monk.name: Astral Projection
monk.description: Spend 8 ki to project your astral form, leaving your body behind. You can travel across planes.

monk.name: Flurry of Blows II
monk.description: Flurry of Blows now makes four unarmed strikes instead of two.

monk.name: Transcendent Awareness
monk.description: You have blindsight 30 feet, cannot be surprised, and have advantage on all AGI and INS saves.

monk.name: Perfect Self
monk.description: Gain +4 to AGI and INS permanently. Max for these stats is now 24. If you roll initiative with 0 ki, regain 4 ki.

monk.name: One Thousand Fists
monk.description: Once per long rest, make 10 unarmed strike attacks in a single action, each dealing martial arts die + AGI modifier.

warlock.name: Eldritch Blast
warlock.description: Fire a beam of crackling energy dealing 1d10 force damage. This is your pact cantrip.

warlock.name: Dark One's Blessing
warlock.description: When you reduce a hostile creature to 0 HP, gain temp HP equal to your PRE modifier + warlock level.

warlock.name: Agonizing Blast
warlock.description: Add your PRE modifier to the damage of Eldritch Blast.

warlock.name: Hex
warlock.description: Curse a creature dealing an extra 1d6 necrotic damage on each hit. Lasts 1 hour or until target dies.

warlock.name: Pact of the Blade
warlock.description: Create a magical weapon from nothing. It counts as magical and uses PRE for attack and damage rolls.

warlock.name: Devil's Sight
warlock.description: You can see normally in magical and nonmagical darkness up to 120 feet.

warlock.name: Repelling Blast
warlock.description: Each Eldritch Blast hit pushes the target 10 feet away from you.

warlock.name: Hunger of Hadar
warlock.description: Open a gate to the void in a 20-foot sphere. Creatures inside take 2d6 cold damage and can't see.

warlock.name: Thirsting Blade
warlock.description: Attack twice with your pact weapon instead of once when you take the Attack action.

warlock.name: Counterspell
warlock.description: As a reaction, attempt to negate an enemy spell. Uses your PRE modifier for the check.

warlock.name: Eldritch Blast II
warlock.description: Eldritch Blast now fires 2 beams. Each beam deals 1d10 + PRE modifier force damage.

warlock.name: Dark One's Own Luck
warlock.description: Once per rest, add 1d10 to an ability check or saving throw.

warlock.name: Fiendish Resilience
warlock.description: After a rest, choose one damage type. You have resistance to it until your next rest.

warlock.name: Shadow of Moil
warlock.description: Become wreathed in shadowy flames. You are heavily obscured and deal 2d8 necrotic to attackers.

warlock.name: Lifedrinker
warlock.description: Your pact weapon deals extra necrotic damage equal to your PRE modifier on every hit.

warlock.name: Banishment
warlock.description: Banish a creature to a harmless demiplane on a failed PRE save. Lasts 1 minute if native to this plane.

warlock.name: Hurl Through Hell
warlock.description: On a hit, send the target through the lower planes. They return at end of your next turn taking 10d10 psychic damage.

warlock.name: Whispers of the Grave
warlock.description: You can cast Speak with Dead at will without spending spell points.

warlock.name: Eldritch Blast III
warlock.description: Eldritch Blast now fires 3 beams.

warlock.name: Mystic Arcanum I
warlock.description: Learn one 6th-level spell. Cast it once per long rest without spending spell points.

warlock.name: Eldritch Armor
warlock.description: As an action, touch a suit of armor to bond with it. You gain proficiency and it cannot be removed against your will.

warlock.name: Bewitching Whispers
warlock.description: Once per rest, cast Compulsion without spending SP. Targets must move in a direction you choose on failed INS save.

warlock.name: Mystic Arcanum II
warlock.description: Learn one 7th-level spell. Cast it once per long rest without spending spell points.

warlock.name: Chains of Carceri
warlock.description: Once per rest, cast Hold Monster on a celestial, fiend, or elemental without spending SP.

warlock.name: Witch Sight
warlock.description: See the true form of any shapechanger or creature concealed by illusion or transmutation magic within 30 feet.

warlock.name: Mystic Arcanum III
warlock.description: Learn one 8th-level spell. Cast it once per long rest without spending spell points.

warlock.name: Master of Myriad Forms
warlock.description: Cast Alter Self at will without spending SP.

warlock.name: Eldritch Blast IV
warlock.description: Eldritch Blast now fires 4 beams. Each beam can target different creatures.

warlock.name: Mystic Arcanum IV
warlock.description: Learn one 9th-level spell. Cast it once per long rest without spending spell points.

warlock.name: Eldritch Resilience
warlock.description: Gain +2 to all saving throws. Your patron shields your mind from intrusion.

warlock.name: Eldritch Master
warlock.description: Once per long rest, spend 1 minute to regain all expended spell points.

warlock.name: Shroud of Shadow
warlock.description: Cast Invisibility at will without spending SP. Lasts until you attack or cast a spell.

warlock.name: Patron's Embrace
warlock.description: When you drop to 0 HP, your patron intervenes. Regain half max HP and deal 4d10 necrotic to all enemies within 10 feet. Once per rest.

warlock.name: Visions of Distant Realms
warlock.description: Cast Arcane Eye at will without spending SP. You can see through the eye up to 1 mile.

warlock.name: Dread Lord
warlock.description: For 1 minute, creatures of your choice within 30 feet take 4d10 psychic damage at start of their turn.

warlock.name: Eldritch Sovereign
warlock.description: Gain +4 to PRE and MND permanently. Max for these stats is now 24. All pact spells cost half SP.

warlock.name: Patron's Wrath
warlock.description: Once per long rest, call your patron's full power. Deal 12d10 damage of a type matching your patron in a 60-foot radius.

sorcerer.name: Bloodline Arcana
sorcerer.description: Your innate magic grants +1 to spell save DC for spells matching your bloodline element.

sorcerer.name: Chaos Bolt
sorcerer.description: Hurl an orb of chaotic energy dealing 2d8+1d6 damage of a random type. On doubles, it jumps to another target.

sorcerer.name: Font of Magic
sorcerer.description: Convert SP into sorcery points or vice versa. 1 SP = 1 sorcery point. Sorcery points fuel metamagic.

sorcerer.name: Draconic Resilience
sorcerer.description: Your HP max increases by 1 per level. When not wearing armor, your AC equals 13 + AGI modifier.

sorcerer.name: Metamagic: Twinned
sorcerer.description: Spend sorcery points equal to the spell's level to target a second creature with a single-target spell.

sorcerer.name: Metamagic: Subtle
sorcerer.description: Spend 1 sorcery point to cast a spell without verbal or somatic components. Cannot be counterspelled.

sorcerer.name: Elemental Affinity
sorcerer.description: When casting a spell matching your bloodline element, add PRE modifier to one damage roll.

sorcerer.name: Metamagic: Quickened
sorcerer.description: Spend 2 sorcery points to cast a spell with a casting time of 1 action as a bonus action.

sorcerer.name: Elemental Resistance
sorcerer.description: Spend 1 sorcery point to gain resistance to your bloodline damage type for 1 hour.

sorcerer.name: Empowered Spell
sorcerer.description: Spend 1 sorcery point to reroll up to PRE modifier damage dice on a spell. Must use new rolls.

sorcerer.name: Metamagic: Heightened
sorcerer.description: Spend 3 sorcery points to give one target disadvantage on their saving throw against your spell.

sorcerer.name: Bloodline Power
sorcerer.description: Gain a special ability based on your bloodline: draconic wings (30 ft fly), shadow walk, or storm aura.

sorcerer.name: Metamagic: Careful
sorcerer.description: Spend 1 sorcery point to let PRE modifier creatures auto-succeed on saves against your area spell.

sorcerer.name: Bend Luck
sorcerer.description: Spend 2 sorcery points as a reaction to add or subtract 1d4 from a creature's attack, check, or save.

sorcerer.name: Metamagic: Distant
sorcerer.description: Spend 1 sorcery point to double the range of a spell. Touch spells become 30 feet.

sorcerer.name: Elemental Affinity II
sorcerer.description: When casting bloodline spells, add PRE modifier to damage AND gain temp HP equal to PRE modifier.

sorcerer.name: Sorcerous Versatility
sorcerer.description: When you finish a long rest, replace one metamagic option with another you could learn.

sorcerer.name: Arcane Eruption
sorcerer.description: Unleash raw sorcerous power in a 30-foot radius dealing 6d8 damage of your bloodline type.

sorcerer.name: Metamagic: Extended
sorcerer.description: Spend 1 sorcery point to double the duration of a spell (max 24 hours).

sorcerer.name: Spell Bombardment
sorcerer.description: When you roll maximum on a spell damage die, roll it again and add the result.

sorcerer.name: Wild Surge
sorcerer.description: Once per turn, after casting a sorcerer spell, roll on the wild magic table for a random additional effect.

sorcerer.name: Metamagic: Seeking
sorcerer.description: Spend 2 sorcery points to reroll a spell attack that misses. Must use the new roll.

sorcerer.name: Innate Sorcery
sorcerer.description: Your spell attacks gain +2 to hit and your spell save DC increases by 1.

sorcerer.name: Bloodline Resilience
sorcerer.description: Gain resistance to two damage types associated with your bloodline permanently.

sorcerer.name: Reality Break
sorcerer.description: Tear at reality around one creature. For 1 minute, at start of each turn they suffer a random debilitating effect.

sorcerer.name: Metamagic Adept
sorcerer.description: You can apply two metamagic options to the same spell instead of one.

sorcerer.name: Wild Magic Shield
sorcerer.description: When a Wild Surge would harm you, negate it and gain 2d10 temp HP instead.

sorcerer.name: Sorcerous Restoration
sorcerer.description: Regain 4 sorcery points on a short rest.

sorcerer.name: Metamagic: Overcharged
sorcerer.description: Spend 5 sorcery points to cast a spell at one level higher than its maximum without additional SP cost.

sorcerer.name: Bloodline Immunity
sorcerer.description: Gain immunity to your bloodline damage type. You absorb that damage type, healing for half the amount.

sorcerer.name: Arcane Apotheosis
sorcerer.description: For 1 minute, all your spells cost 1 fewer SP (minimum 0) and your spell attacks auto-crit on 19-20.

sorcerer.name: Font of Magic II
sorcerer.description: Sorcery point maximum doubles. Converting SP to sorcery points now yields 2 per SP.

sorcerer.name: Draconic Presence
sorcerer.description: Spend 5 sorcery points to exude an aura of awe or fear in 60 feet. All creatures must save or be charmed/frightened.

sorcerer.name: Metamagic Master
sorcerer.description: All metamagic costs are reduced by 1 sorcery point (minimum 0).

sorcerer.name: Sorcerous Rejuvenation
sorcerer.description: At the start of each turn, if below half SP, regain SP equal to your PRE modifier.

sorcerer.name: Bloodline Ascendant
sorcerer.description: Gain +4 to PRE permanently. Max PRE is now 24. All bloodline spells deal maximum damage.

sorcerer.name: Sorcerous Cataclysm
sorcerer.description: Once per long rest, release all remaining SP in a devastating explosion dealing 2d6 per SP spent in a 120-foot radius.
